prompt: SUBJECT: beef and cilantro dumplings matching the EXACT dumpling shape shown in the attached photo - folded crescent-shaped dumplings with a pleated seam, porcelain-white wrappers with soft grey shading (NOT round pleated-top baozi buns), arranged in a round bamboo steamer in natural wood tones, wisps of pale steam, small fresh green cilantro accents. STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's food illustration - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE subject must sit fully inside this wide frame with a generous empty margin of at least 15 percent on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge; do not copy the photo's tight cropping. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
